# TemperLoop

> A dev-process kernel for Claude Code–driven development: a board adapter
> that turns a GitHub Projects board (or a plain issues-only tracker) into a
> cross-session work queue, a build/sweep pipeline of Claude Code slash
> commands that drives a GitHub issue from triage to a merged, CI-green pull
> request, and the install/quality-gate tooling that gets both running in a
> repo you already have.

TemperLoop is a toolkit — scripts, slash commands, and contract files you
read — not a hosted service or an app you depend on. It is Apache-2.0
licensed; see [`LICENSE`](LICENSE).

## Docs

- [README](README.md): what TemperLoop is, prerequisites, the CLI
  quickstart, repo layout, the command map, the docs site, and the
  merge-backend notes.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): cross-agent operating instructions for a coding
  agent working in this repo — the CLI vs. `make` split, board-adapter
  rules and the GraphQL budget, quality gates, and the branch/PR/worktree
  safety rails.
- [Principles](docs/principles.md): the design principles behind the
  kernel.
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): how the board adapter, the
  build/sweep pipeline, and the install/quality-gate tooling fit together.
- [Who it's for](docs/who-its-for.md): the intended adopter and use case.
- [Feature docs](docs/features/): per-feature reference pages.
- [Managed merge queue](docs/managed-merge-queue.md): running the
  build/sweep merge ladder end-to-end on a repo with no native GitHub merge
  queue available.
- [Config precedence](docs/config-precedence.md): the six-rung config
  resolution ladder every tunable knob in this repo follows.
- [Contributing](docs/CONTRIBUTING.md): how to contribute a failure-mode
  chapter, or a new knowledge-store or issue-tracker adapter.

## Optional

- [CLI reference](bin/README.md): install, prerequisites, and the
  `try` → `try --demo` → `init` quickstart in full.
- [Plan-note schema](claude/plan-schema.md): the plan-note contract
  `/assess` writes and `/build` consumes.
- [Kernel process contract](claude/CLAUDE.kernel.md): the full branch/PR,
  board-adapter, and workflow rules governing Claude Code sessions in this
  and sibling repos.
- [Failure-mode chapters](docs/failure-modes/): real engineering failures
  this project hit, each ending in the mechanical guard it produced.
